1 PANICLE WORLDWIDE GI-PWG
Stand No - DG-H55, Hall No -North Hall 13
India
COMPANY PROFILE
Panicle Worldwide Pvt. Ltd., established in New Delhi and formally incorporated in 2017 after beginning its journey in 2014, has quickly grown into a trusted name in the manufacturing and exporting of premium food products.
The company specializes in exporting high-quality peanut butter and rich Arabica coffee to a global customer base.
Operating under the name Panicle Worldwide GI (PWG), the core mission is to keep food healthy and nutritious by ensuring all products are free of hidden additives. They are committed to innovation, focusing on creating new tastes and developing unique products while maintaining a strong emphasis on quality, health, and customer satisfaction.
The company views it as a moral responsibility to provide the best food and services, guaranteeing customer satisfaction worldwide.

Stand No - SH-Y10, Hall No -South Hall 12
India
COMPANY PROFILE
Sonya Foods Pvt. Ltd., established in 2013, is a leading manufacturer and exporter of high-quality peanut butter, almond butter, and flavoured peanuts. With a strong focus on quality, consistency, and innovation, Sonya Foods operates a fully automated, state-of-the-art manufacturing facility designed to meet global food safety and hygiene standards.
The company is BRCGS Grade A, HACCP, Halal, and SEDEX certified, reflecting its commitment to international compliance and responsible manufacturing practices.
Sonya Foods serves customers in over 35 countries worldwide, offering both branded and end-to-end private label solutions tailored to diverse market requirements. Backed by technical expertise, scalable capacity, and export-ready systems, Sonya Foods is a trusted partner in the industry for distributors, retailers, and importers across global markets.

COMPANY PROFILE
Mercanda Middle East Trading L.L.C., based in Dubai, is proud to offer 1 Attimo Informa, a leading Italian healthy-living brand, to the Middle East. As the brand owner and regional partner, Mercanda brings a full portfolio of premium, European-certified products across Keto & Low-Carb, Proteins, Meal Replacements, Hydration & Functional Drinks, Snacks & Breakfast, and Confectioneries & Spreads. Designed for today’s health-conscious consumers, 1 Attimo Informa blends authentic Italian taste with innovation and wellness. With strong market presence and strategic support, Mercanda enables supermarkets, specialty stores, distributors, and cafés across the GCC to grow with a trusted international brand.

Stand No - 9-43, Hall No -South Hall 1
Poland
COMPANY PROFILE
The idea behind launching Feel FIT is to create a brand that truly stands out in the healthy snack category. Our mission is to offer products that are not only nutritious but also exceptionally tasty and unique on the market. The Feel FIT assortment perfectly aligns with the growing convenience trend, providing quick, wholesome, and enjoyable snacking options for everyday needs. Our offer includes protein and energy snacks, protein and vegan spreads, as well as protein cookies, no-added-sugar cookies. We also produce high-quality protein pralines, vegan and gluten-free pralines made with carefully selected ingredients. At Feel FIT, food safety and top production standards are among our highest priorities. This ensures that every product meets the expectations of conscious consumers seeking healthy, functional, and flavorful snacks. Feel FIT aims to redefine everyday snacking by combining great taste, innovation, and the assurance of premium quality.

0 BRAND FACTORY LTD
Stand No - 4-69, Hall No -South Hall 1
United Kingdom
COMPANY PROFILE
Brand Factory Ltd. is an award-winning UK-based wholesale export company specializing in the consolidation and global distribution of leading FMCG brands from the UK and Europe. Founded in 2018 and based in Aylesbury, United Kingdom, the company has played a key role in modernizing the FMCG export industry.
Our vision is to be a digitally driven, process-efficient organization delivering high-quality FMCG products worldwide. We are committed to exceptional standards of quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction.
Operating from a dedicated 35,000 sq. ft. warehouse and office, Brand Factory offers a wide product portfolio, including confectionery, biscuits, breakfast cereals, soft drinks, beverages, grocery, healthcare, Frozen, chilled, Household goods, toiletries, Personal and Baby Care, and Pet Care. With partnerships spanning over 1,000 brands, 250 suppliers, and 1,400 customers across more than 80 countries, we manage the entire export process—from order receipt and labeling to logistics, customs, and final delivery—with transparency, ethics, and integrity.

0 We Get Any Stock - UK's Leading FMCG Exporter of UK, EU & USA Products
Stand No - 3-113, Hall No -South Hall 1
United Kingdom
COMPANY PROFILE
We Get Any Stock is a leading UK-based wholesale and export company supplying more than 24,000 fast-moving branded consumer goods across food, drink, baby care, pet care, and household essentials. With over 13 years of industry expertise, we serve retailers, distributors, and importers worldwide, exporting to more than 45 countries and supporting orders ranging from single pallets to full container loads.
Recognised for our strong global performance, we are proud recipients of The King’s Award for Enterprise in International Trade, reflecting our consistent growth, commitment to excellence, and contribution to UK export success.
Our reputation is built on fast, flexible sourcing, competitive pricing, and exceptional customer service. Through a responsive team and a streamlined logistics network, we deliver reliable supply solutions tailored to evolving market demands. As a trusted partner in the global supply chain, We Get Any Stock continues to connect leading brands with international markets efficiently and consistently.
